name: Honey Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients: sifted all-purpose flour, cooking bran, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten egg, liquid honey, milk, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Create a well in the center of the dry ingredient mixture. Pour the liquid mixture into the well and stir quickly with a spatula until just mixed but still lumpy.
4. Fill each well-greased muffin tin 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown on top.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, ensure that the oven is turned off after baking and all utensils are cleaned properly.
